title: glycosmis chlorosperma var. lindleyana
intro: Glycosmis chlorosperma var. lindleyana, also known as the Lindleyana form of the Queensland native Glycosmis chlorosperma, is a variety of plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Glycosmis chlorosperma var. lindleyana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or extracting the plant's active compounds with a solvent.
